description:
Advances: mutagen.mutation_enumeration

Deliverable:
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex` (module
  `MutagenEx.MutationEnumerator`) implementing the contract in
  [mutagen.mutation_enumeration](.spec/specs/mutation_enumeration.spec.md).
- Walks the in-scope AST sub-trees from the AST cache; filters by
  `covered_lines`; consults each mutator's `validate/1`; emits
  `[%MutationSite{}]` plus a parallel `skipped` list.
- Determinism: same `{ast_cache, scope_records, covered_lines}` produces the
  same output, byte-identical, run-to-run.
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator_test.exs` covers all requirements.
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator_property_test.exs` exercises the
  determinism invariant on randomly generated input tuples.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test test/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator_test.exs`,
  `mix test test/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator_property_test.exs`.
- Covers spec-verification stubs `mutagen.mutation_enumeration.v1`, `.v2`, `.v3`.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenarios `mutagen.mutation_enumeration.s1` through `s6`.

Out of Scope (files):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex` (S5)
- `lib/mutagen_ex/ast_cache.ex` (S5)
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex` (S5)
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/**` (S4a)

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex`
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator_test.exs`
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator_property_test.exs`

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not read source files. All AST data comes from the (mocked-in-tests)
  AST cache per [mutagen.mutation_enumeration](.spec/specs/mutation_enumeration.spec.md) r6.
- Do not compile or run any mutation. Enumeration produces a plan; execution
  is S5.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly with `--warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] Unit + property tests pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes (`mutagen.mutation_enumeration.v1`-`.v3`)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S4b: Mutation enumerator
